flags_raised: CRITICAL: $8,742.19 exceeds autonomous limit of $5,000.00. Manager approval required.
Semantic divergence detected: Agent output only 23.1% aligned with expected compliance behavior

root_cause_analysis.root_cause: The agent failed because it was instructed to 'Process this transaction' without being given a specific constraint to check for autonomous spending limits.

remediation.corrected_system_prompt: Process this transaction, ensuring adherence to all applicable policy rules, including obtaining secondary manager signature and explicit authorization code for expenditures exceeding $5,000 USD.
remediation.constraint_added: Must obtain secondary manager signature and explicit authorization code for expenditures exceeding $5,000 USD
preventive_measures: Implement regular auditing of agent decisions with a focus on high-value transactions
Enforce explicit authorization codes for transactions near or exceeding autonomous spending limits
Conduct scenario-based training for agents to improve understanding of policy rules and constraints

governance.next_step: Route to AI Governance Team for prompt review and approval before redeployment
governance.audit_trail: Full reasoning trace preserved in incident log
